output.code:
# Let's load the raw text from the provided file and print it with indices for debugging.
path = '/mnt/data/file-GHbVKSj1H5NRBnc34faWjp-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw_text = f.read()
raw_text[:1000], len(raw_text)

# Let's find all occurrences between double quotes
import re

text = raw_text

matches = []
for m in re.finditer(r'"', text):
    matches.append(m.start())

# group into pairs
pairs = list(zip(matches[::2], matches[1::2]))
len(pairs), pairs[:10]

# Extract content and show context around each
spans = []
for start_q, end_q in pairs:
    content = text[start_q+1:end_q]
    spans.append((start_q, end_q, content))
spans

import unicodedata
selected_indices = [0,1,4,5,6,7,8,9,10]  # we skip 2 and 3 (synonyms)
for i in selected_indices:
    s,e,c = spans[i]
    leading = repr(c[0])
    trailing = repr(c[-1])
    print(i, s+1, e, leading, trailing, '|', c[:10], '...', c[-10:])

# Print context around each selected span 
for i in selected_indices:
    s,e,c = spans[i]
    start = s+1
    end = e
    context_start = max(0, start-50)
    context_end = min(len(text), end+50)
    print(f"Span {i}: {start}-{end}: {c}")
    print(text[context_start:context_end])
    print("----")

# Validate that indices produce the exact substrings
results = []
for i in selected_indices:
    s,e,c = spans[i]
    start = s+1
    end = e
    extracted = raw_text[start:end]
    results.append((start, end, c, extracted, c == extracted))
all(results), [ok for (*_, ok) in results]

# Build the final list of citation dicts
citation_list = []

def add_citation(start, end, text, ctype):
    citation_list.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": text,
        "citation_type": ctype
    })

# Add
# 0
add_citation(167, 311, raw_text[167:311], "Aya")
# 1
add_citation(373, 382, raw_text[373:382], "Aya")
# 4
add_citation(474, 488, raw_text[474:488], "Aya")
# 5
add_citation(563, 683, raw_text[563:683], "Aya")
# 6
add_citation(745, 771, raw_text[745:771], "Aya")
# 7
add_citation(835, 846, raw_text[835:846], "Aya")
# 8
add_citation(948, 1051, raw_text[948:1051], "Hadeeth")
# 9
add_citation(1149, 1164, raw_text[1149:1164], "Hadeeth")
# 10
add_citation(1225, 1234, raw_text[1225:1234], "Hadeeth")

citation_list

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":167,"span_end":311,"span_text":"وَلَوْ تَرَى إِذْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَى الْأَمْثَالِ فَتَقَعَّدُوا فَتَنَاكَرُوا وَكُنتَ أَنْظَرُهُمْ إِذْ تَبِتُ أَنْفُسُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَسْتَخِفُّونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":373,"span_end":382,"span_text":"أَمْثَالُ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":474,"span_end":488,"span_text":"يَتَنَاكَرُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":563,"span_end":683,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنْسَانَ مِنْ صَلْصَالٍ مِنْ وَصْلٍ فَكَفَرَ الرَسُولُ وَآتَينَاهُ مِنْ لَدُنْ عِنْدَنَا بَيَانًا","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":745,"span_end":771,"span_text":"مِنْ صَلْصَالٍ مِنْ وَصْلٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":835,"span_end":846,"span_text":"يَكْفُرُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":948,"span_end":1051,"span_text":"الزاني والزانية والمنافق والممنوقة والمجرور والمستأذن والمستمسك بالسحر من الجاهلين لا يَدخُلُ الجَنَّةَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1149,"span_end":1164,"span_text":"الزاني والزانية","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1225,"span_end":1234,"span_text":"يَضِلُّون","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
